heading: Establishment of program
label: 1320f Establishment of program

children.text: publish a list of selected drugs in accordance with ;section 1320f–1 of this title
enter into agreements with manufacturers of selected drugs with respect to such period, in accordance with ;section 1320f–2 of this title
negotiate and, if applicable, renegotiate maximum fair prices for such selected drugs, in accordance with ;section 1320f–3 of this title1So in original. Probably should be followed by “and”.1
carry out the publication and administrative duties and compliance monitoring in accordance with sections 1320f–4 and 1320f–5 of this title.

children.heading: Initial price applicability year
children.label: 1 Initial price applicability year
children.text: The term “initial price applicability year” means a year (beginning with 2026).

children.heading: Price applicability period
children.label: 2 Price applicability period
children.text: The term “price applicability period” means, with respect to a qualifying single source drug, the period beginning with the first initial price applicability year with respect to which such drug is a selected drug and ending with the last year during which the drug is a selected drug.

children.heading: Selected drug publication date
children.label: 3 Selected drug publication date
children.text: The term “selected drug publication date” means, with respect to each initial price applicability year, February 1 of the year that begins 2 years prior to such year.

children.label: i
children.text: the date on which the manufacturer of the drug and the Secretary enter into an agreement under with respect to such drug; orsection 1320f–2 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: February 28 following the selected drug publication date with respect to such selected drug; and

children.label: B
children.text: ending on November 1 of the year that begins 2 years prior to the initial price applicability year.

children.heading: Manufacturer
children.label: 1 Manufacturer
children.text: The term “manufacturer” has the meaning given that term in .section 1395w–3a(c)(6)(A) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: in the case such drug is dispensed to the individual at a pharmacy, by a mail order service, or by another dispenser, an individual who is enrolled in a prescription drug plan under part D of subchapter XVIII or an MA–PD plan under part C of such subchapter if coverage is provided under such plan for such selected drug; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case such drug is furnished or administered to the individual by a hospital, physician, or other provider of services or supplier, an individual who is enrolled under part B of subchapter XVIII, including an individual who is enrolled in an MA plan under part C of such subchapter, if payment may be made under part B for such selected drug.

children.heading: Maximum fair price
children.label: 3 Maximum fair price
children.text: The term “maximum fair price” means, with respect to a year during a price applicability period and with respect to a selected drug (as defined in ) with respect to such period, the price negotiated pursuant to , and updated pursuant to , as applicable, for such drug and year.section 1320f–1(c) of this titlesection 1320f–3 of this titlesection 1320f–4(b) of this title

children.heading: Reference product
children.label: 4 Reference product
children.text: The term “reference product” has the meaning given such term in .section 262(i) of this title

children.heading: Total expenditures
children.label: 5 Total expenditures
children.text: The term “total expenditures” includes, in the case of expenditures with respect to part D of subchapter XVIII, the total gross covered prescription drug costs (as defined in ). The term “total expenditures” excludes, in the case of expenditures with respect to part B of such subchapter, expenditures for a drug or biological product that are bundled or packaged into the payment for another service.section 1395w–115(b)(3) of this title

children.heading: Unit
children.label: 6 Unit
children.text: The term “unit” means, with respect to a drug or biological product, the lowest identifiable amount (such as a capsule or tablet, milligram of molecules, or grams) of the drug or biological product that is dispensed or furnished.

children.heading: Timing for initial price applicability year 2026
children.label: d Timing for initial price applicability year 2026
